sqlMap.select: SELECT product_id AS productId, name, category, price, seller_name AS sellerName, status FROM product WHERE status = 'ON_SALE'
SELECT product_id AS productId, name, category, price, seller_name AS sellerName, status FROM product WHERE product_id = #id#
SELECT option_id AS optionId, product_id AS productId, option_name AS optionName, extra_price AS extraPrice, stock_qty AS stockQty FROM product_option WHERE product_id = #productId#

SELECT product_id AS productId, name, category, price, seller_name AS sellerName, status FROM product
name LIKE CONCAT('%', #keyword#, '%')
category = #category#
price >= #minPrice#
price <= #maxPrice#
status IN
#statuses[]#
ORDER BY product_id

SELECT po.option_id, po.product_id, po.option_name, po.extra_price, po.stock_qty, p.name AS product_name, p.price AS base_price FROM product_option po JOIN product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id WHERE po.option_id = #optionId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE product_option SET stock_qty = stock_qty - #qty# WHERE option_id = #optionId#
UPDATE product_option SET stock_qty = stock_qty + #qty# WHERE option_id = #optionId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT product_id AS productId, name, category, price, seller_name AS sellerName, status FROM product ORDER BY product_id LIMIT #size# OFFSET #offset#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE status = 'ON_SALE' AND category = #category#
